verses.1: Do you indeed speak righteousness, silent ones?
verses.2: No, in your heart you plot injustice.
verses.3: The wicked go astray from the womb.
verses.4: Their poison is like the poison of a snake,
verses.5: which doesn’t listen to the voice of charmers,
verses.6: Break their teeth, God, in their mouth.
verses.7: Let them vanish like water that flows away.
verses.8: Let them be like a snail which melts and passes away,
verses.9: Before your pots can feel the heat of the thorns,
verses.10: The righteous shall rejoice when he sees the vengeance.
verses.11: so that men shall say, “Most certainly there is a reward for the righteous.
